case_title: KIM HOA NGUYEN VS. VIETNAM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM HOA AS TO DEFENDANT VIETNAM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM HOA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIETNAM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $56,745.35 PRINCIPAL, $1,151.15 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $58,346.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
